channel.title: Polen Capital — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Polen Capital (Polen Capital Management) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Polen Capital: TRIMMED META (-22%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Polen Capital (Polen Capital Management) trimmed META in Q4 2025 · 4.1% of portfolio. Major META reduction.

item.title: Polen Capital: ADDED NOW (+15%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Polen Capital (Polen Capital Management) added NOW in Q4 2025 · 7.8% of portfolio. Adding ServiceNow.

item.title: Polen Capital: TRIMMED AMZN (-23%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Polen Capital (Polen Capital Management) trimmed AMZN (AMAZON COM INC) in Q4 2025 · 8.5% of portfolio.
